util.c(3) Library Functions Manual util.c(3)

NAME

util.c - Utility stubs for WASM/Emscripten (backtrace, localtime).

SYNOPSIS

Functions


int platform_backtrace (void **buffer, int size)
char ** platform_backtrace_symbols (void *const *buffer, int size)
void platform_backtrace_symbols_destroy (char **symbols)
void platform_print_backtrace_symbols (const char *label, char **symbols, int count, int skip_frames, int max_frames, backtrace_frame_filter_t filter)
void platform_print_backtrace (int skip_frames)
asciichat_error_t platform_localtime (const time_t *timer, struct tm *result)
int platform_isatty (int fd)
void platform_clear_error_state (void)
bool platform_get_temp_dir (char *temp_dir, size_t path_size)
bool platform_prompt_yes_no (const char *question, bool default_yes)
int platform_get_last_error (void)
const char * platform_get_home_dir (void)
void platform_normalize_path_separators (char *path)
char * platform_get_config_dir (void)
bool platform_get_cwd (char *cwd, size_t path_size)
int platform_path_strcasecmp (const char *a, const char *b, size_t n)
int platform_is_regular_file (const char *path)

Detailed Description

Utility stubs for WASM/Emscripten (backtrace, localtime).

Definition in file util.c.

Function Documentation

int platform_backtrace (void ** buffer, int size)

Definition at line 15 of file util.c.

15                                                 {
16   (void)buffer;
17   (void)size;
18   return 0; // No backtrace support in WASM
19 }

  platform_clear_error_state (void )


Definition at line 68 of file util.c.


68                                       {
69   // No-op - error state is thread-local, nothing to clear in WASM

Definition at line 109 of file util.c.


109                                                    {
110   if (!cwd || path_size == 0) {
111     return false;
112   }
113   platform_strlcpy(cwd, "/", path_size);
114   return true;
115 }

  platform_is_regular_file (const char * path)

  platform_isatty (int fd)


Definition at line 62 of file util.c.


62                             {
63   (void)fd;
64   return 1; // Always true for WASM terminal (xterm.js)
65 }

asciichat_error_t
  platform_localtime (const time_t * timer, struct tm * result)


Definition at line 49 of file util.c.


49                                                                              {
50   if (!timer || !result) {
51     return ERROR_INVALID_PARAM;
52   }
53   // Use thread-safe localtime_r for both WASM and native builds
54   // IMPORTANT: localtime() is NOT thread-safe and causes deadlocks in threaded WASM builds
55   if (localtime_r(timer, result) != NULL) {
56     return ASCIICHAT_OK;
57   }
58   return ERROR_PLATFORM_INIT;
59 }






Referenced by asciichat_error_stats_print(),
    asciichat_print_error_context(), get_current_time_formatted(),
    manpage_fmt_write_title(), and time_format_now().






void
  platform_normalize_path_separators (char * path)


Definition at line 97 of file util.c.


97                                                     {
98   // No-op - WASM uses forward slashes (Unix-style)
99   (void)path;
100 }






Referenced by expand_path().

  platform_path_strcasecmp (const char * a, const char * b, size_t n)


Definition at line 118 of file util.c.


118                                                                      {
119   return strncmp(a, b, n); // Case-sensitive on WASM
120 }
